entries.summary: Created complete Colab training notebook for DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B with mixed data (Quran 30% + Code 40% + Conversation 30%). Fixed model name and Quran dataset name.
entries.details: Notebook at P:\aura-book\backend\training\deepseek_coder_arabic.ipynb. Model: deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct (NOT unsloth/...). Quran dataset: ReySajju742/Quran (62K rows, NOT zusmani/the-holy-quran which doesn't exist). Code: bigcode/the-stack. Conversation: teknium/OpenHermes-2.5.
